title: Ball Valve Specs
description: Technical specifications schema for ball valves (Válvula Bola). 40 fields from PIM catalog.

dn.title: DN (Nominal Diameter)
dn.description: Diámetro nominal — e.g. DN15, DN25, DN50

dn_real.title: DN Real (Internal Bore Diameter)
dn_real.description: Diámetro agujero interno — actual internal bore diameter

size.title: Size (Flange or Thread)
size.description: Size designation for flange or thread connections — e.g. 1/2", 3/4", DN50

materials_body.title: Body Material
materials_body.description: Materiales Cuerpo — body casting material (e.g. brass, stainless steel 316, carbon steel)

materials_closure.title: Closure / Ball Material
materials_closure.description: Material Cierre — ball/plug material (e.g. chrome-plated brass, PTFE-coated)

materials_seats.title: Seat Material
materials_seats.description: Materiales Asientos — seat ring material (e.g. PTFE, RPTFE)

materials_gaskets.title: Gasket / Seal Material
materials_gaskets.description: Materiales Juntas — gasket and stem packing material (e.g. PTFE, NBR, EPDM)

fabrication_method.title: Fabrication Method
fabrication_method.description: Método de fabricación — e.g. casting, forging

connections.title: Connection Ends
connections.description: Conexión 1/2/3 — up to 3 connection ends with position, type, DN and optional threading

dn.title: Connection DN
dn.description: Nominal diameter of this connection end

threading.title: Thread Standard
threading.description: Thread designation — e.g. BSP, NPT, ISO

dim_L.title: Dimension L (Face-to-Face)
dim_L.description: Dimensión L — face-to-face length in mm (Entre caras)

dim_H.title: Dimension H (Axis to Lever Top)
dim_H.description: Dimension H — height from axis to top of lever/handwheel in mm (Desde eje a maneta)

dim_H1.title: Dimension H1 (Axis to ISO5211 Platform)
dim_H1.description: Dimensión H1 — height from axis to ISO5211 mounting platform base in mm

dim_W.title: Dimension W (Lever / Handwheel Length)
dim_W.description: Dimension W — lever or handwheel length in mm (Longitud maneta, volante)

dim_T1.title: Dimension T1 (Thread Length End 1)
dim_T1.description: Dimensión T1 — thread engagement length end 1 in mm (Longitud rosca 1)

dim_T2.title: Dimension T2 (Thread Length End 2)
dim_T2.description: Dimensión T2 — thread engagement length end 2 in mm (Longitud rosca 2)

dim_T3.title: Dimension T3 (Thread Length End 3)
dim_T3.description: Dimensión T3 — thread engagement length end 3 in mm for 3-way valves (Longitud rosca 3)

dim_S.title: Dimension S (Stem Square)
dim_S.description: Dimensión S — stem square drive size in mm (Cuadradillo eje)

dim_h.title: Dimension h (Stem Height above ISO5211)
dim_h.description: Dimensión h — stem protrusion height above ISO 5211 platform in mm (Altura eje sobre plataforma ISO 5211)

iso5211_face.title: ISO 5211 Mounting Face
iso5211_face.description: Dimensión ISO 5211 — mounting flange face designation(s)

dim_SCH.title: Dimension SCH (Weld Pipe Schedule)
dim_SCH.description: Dimensión SCH — pipe schedule for butt-weld ends (e.g. SCH40, SCH80)

dim_D.title: Dimension D (Flange OD)
dim_D.description: Dimensión D — flange outer diameter in mm (Diámetro exterior brida)

dim_K.title: Dimension K (Bolt Circle Diameter)
dim_K.description: Dimensión K — bolt hole pitch circle diameter in mm (Diametro agujeros brida)

kv.title: Flow Coefficient Kv
kv.description: Kv — flow coefficient (m³/h at 1 bar ΔP with water)

torque_nm.title: Operating Torque (N·m)
torque_nm.description: Torque — valve operating torque in Newton-metres at rated pressure
